name: Rune API Client
description: A powerful API testing client built with Tauri, Vue.js, and Rust

suggestions.name: Rune
suggestions.inspiration: Runes are ancient symbols of power and communication - perfect for an API tool

suggestions.name: Aether
suggestions.inspiration: Aether represents the medium through which API requests travel

suggestions.name: Quill
suggestions.inspiration: Quill is a writing instrument - APIs are how we write to web services

suggestions.name: Pylon
suggestions.inspiration: Pylons are structures that support and connect

suggestions.name: Prism
suggestions.inspiration: Prisms refract light into colors - the tool refracts APIs into clarity

suggestions.name: Flux
suggestions.inspiration: Flux represents flow and movement of data

suggestions.name: Catalyst
suggestions.inspiration: Catalysts speed up reactions - this tool speeds up API testing

recommended.name: Rune
recommended.reason: Short, memorable, unique, relates to both Norse mythology (power/symbols) and Rust (the programming language). The tagline 'Forge your API requests' connects to both the mythological and technical aspects.
